subject: (no subject)
body:
Dear Jeff
It is an understatement to say that this has not been an easy year for you
Your true friends know how truly wonderful you are 
And have a generous spirit and great integrity 
My prayer is that 2008 is truly great for you
If I can do anything (as you know)
Please do not hesitate to ask 
I plan to be in China from 2-10 of this month
David
Sent via BlackBerry from T-Mobile  
David Mitchell
NOTE NEW ADDRESS
41 E. 60th Street - 6th Floor
New York NY 10022
212-486-4444 Office
212-588-0286 Fax
917-362-8787 Cell
